name: Nutrient Document Web Services MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Nutrient (PSPDFKit) Document Web Services MCP server enabling AI agents to process documents — converting files between formats (PDF, Word, Excel, images), applying OCR to scanned documents, merging and splitting PDFs, adding annotations and watermarks, extracting text and data from documents, and integrating enterprise document processing into agent-driven document automation workflows.
use_cases: Converting documents between PDF, Word, Excel, and image formats from document processing agents
Applying OCR to extract text from scanned documents from data extraction agents
Merging multiple PDFs into a single document from document assembly agents
Adding watermarks and redactions to sensitive documents from compliance agents
Extracting structured data from PDF forms and invoices from accounting agents
Automating document processing pipelines from enterprise workflow agents
not_for: Teams without Nutrient/PSPDFKit subscription (significant enterprise cost)
Simple PDF text extraction (lighter tools sufficient)
best_when: An enterprise agent needs high-quality document processing — OCR, format conversion, PDF manipulation — with enterprise-grade reliability from Nutrient's commercial document SDK.
avoid_when: Your document processing needs are simple (text extraction only) or budget doesn't support enterprise PDF SDK costs.

auth.notes: Nutrient DWS API key required. Register at nutrient.io for API access. Commercial licensing required for production use.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial available; limited operations for evaluation
pricing.paid_tiers: Nutrient DWS: enterprise pricing per document or subscription
pricing.notes: Nutrient/PSPDFKit is an enterprise product. Free trial available. Production use requires commercial license. MCP server is free.

performance.rate_limits: Plan-dependent; enterprise plans have high limits

known_agent_gotchas: Enterprise commercial pricing — verify budget before integrating into production workflows
Document processing sends files to Nutrient cloud — review data handling for sensitive documents
Large file processing may require chunking or async handling — check file size limits
OCR accuracy varies by document quality — low-resolution scans may produce poor results
Official Nutrient/PSPDFKit MCP — enterprise-grade quality and support
Some advanced features (redaction, digital signatures) may require higher-tier plans
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. SOC2/GDPR/HIPAA compliant. Documents processed via Nutrient cloud — review data residency. API key auth. Enterprise security posture. Official MCP.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. SOC2/GDPR/HIPAA. Enterprise compliance. Documents in cloud — data residency matters. Official Nutrient MCP.
